ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the television show */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the show is produced */,
  "num_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the show */,
  "aired_on" TEXT /* Days on which the show is aired */,
  "original_network" TEXT /* Network that originally aired the show */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the show (e.g., out of 10) */,
  "current_overall_rank" INTEGER /* Current overall ranking of the show */,
  "lifetime_popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Lifetime popularity ranking of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the show */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the show */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the show */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description of the show */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_original_network FOREIGN KEY ("original_network") REFERENCES networks ("network_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewers" (
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer */,
  "viewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the viewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the viewer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the viewer is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the viewer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the viewer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the viewer registered */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Preferred genres of the viewer */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Total watch time in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being watched */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer watching the show */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the show was watched */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the show watched in minutes */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number watched */,
  "watch_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for watching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being rated */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer giving the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the viewer (e.g., out of 10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Viewer's written review */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Likelihood of recommending the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the television network */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the network is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the network was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the network */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the network */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for business inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* The metric being analyzed (e.g., viewer count, rating trend) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of analysis */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
